name: Sweet Potato Taco with Smoked Yellow Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 large sweet potatoes, peeled, cooked & cut into 1/4 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and allow it to burn down to embers.
2. For each serving, lay 3 slices of sweet potato over half of the tortilla.
3. Sprinkle with cheeses, cilantro, and honey. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Fold over the tortilla.
5. Brush with olive oil.
6. Grill for 3 minutes on each side or until crispy and cheese has melted.
7. Serve hot with Smoked Yellow Pepper Vinaigrette.
Yield: 8 servings
